title: DaoFlow Configuration
description: Configuration for DaoFlow CLI deployments. Supports .jsonc, .json, .yaml, .yml, and .toml formats.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for IDE autocompletion.

project.description: Project ID or name. Used to associate this directory with a DaoFlow project.

server.description: Default target server ID for deployments.

compose.description: Path to Docker Compose file, relative to the config file.

composeOverrides.description: Additional compose override files, applied in order after the primary compose file.

composeProfiles.description: Compose profiles to enable for plan and deploy commands.

context.description: Docker build context path, relative to the config file. When set to '.', the entire directory is bundled and uploaded.

dockerfile.description: Dockerfile path, relative to the build context.

ignore.description: Extra patterns to ignore when bundling context. Added to .dockerignore rules.

include.description: Force-include patterns that override .dockerignore. Use for files needed at build time but normally excluded (e.g., .env).

maxContextSize.description: Maximum context bundle size. Deployment fails if context exceeds this limit.

env.description: Build-time environment variables passed to Docker build.
